# Sales — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Sales**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Account Research Summary](../../_canonical/sales-account-research-summary.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for client calls with comprehensive account context from all communications. | intermediate |
| [Competitive Intelligence Search](../../_canonical/sales-competitive-intelligence-search.md) | Cross-App | Gather competitive intelligence from past interactions to inform sales strategy. | intermediate |
| [Customer Escalation Summary](../../_canonical/sales-customer-escalation-summary.md) | Cross-App | Create escalation summaries for leadership briefings. | intermediate |
| [Deal Progress Summary](../../_canonical/sales-deal-progress-summary.md) | Cross-App | Get a complete picture of deal progress from scattered communications before pipeline reviews. | intermediate |
| [Deal Review Preparation](../../_canonical/sales-deal-review-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for deal reviews with full context on the opportunity. | intermediate |
| [Forecast Discussion Summary](../../_canonical/sales-forecast-discussion-summary.md) | Cross-App | Gather forecast context from team discussions. CRM is source of truth for numbers. | intermediate |
| [Lead Qualification Notes](../../_canonical/sales-lead-qualification-notes.md) | Cross-App | Organize discovery information into structured qualification notes. | intermediate |
| [Meeting Request Follow-up](../../_canonical/sales-meeting-request-follow-up.md) | Outlook | Create follow-up sequences that add value without being pushy. | intermediate |
| [Outreach Pattern Analysis](../../_canonical/sales-outreach-pattern-analysis.md) | Outlook | Identify patterns in outreach effectiveness. Supplement with sales analytics tools. | advanced |
| [Outreach Sequence Draft](../../_canonical/sales-outreach-sequence-draft.md) | Outlook | Draft initial outreach emails that can be personalized before sending. | intermediate |
| [Proposal Follow-up Draft](../../_canonical/sales-proposal-follow-up-draft.md) | Outlook | Create personalized proposal follow-ups that reference actual conversation points. | intermediate |
| [Prospect Research](../../_canonical/sales-prospect-research.md) | Cross-App | Research prospects using internal knowledge before outreach. | intermediate |
| [QBR Preparation](../../_canonical/sales-qbr-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare comprehensive QBR content from client interactions. Add metrics from CRM separately. | intermediate |
| [Rep Performance Context](../../_canonical/sales-rep-performance-context.md) | Cross-App | Gather context for 1:1 coaching conversations. Use HR systems for formal reviews. | intermediate |
| [Sales Copilot Guardrails](../../_canonical/sales-copilot-guardrails.md) | Cross-App | Essential guardrails for sales professionals using Copilot. Understand CRM vs. Copilot boundaries. | intermediate |
| [Team Pipeline Summary](../../_canonical/sales-team-pipeline-summary.md) | Cross-App | Consolidate team updates from communications before adding CRM metrics. | intermediate |
